title: ACF Welcomes Three New Team Members
summary: Over the last couple months, Alaska Conservation Foundation has added three new members to our team! title: April 2018 Back Page – Tribute to Loyd Hodson
summary: Less than two years after AVEC energized its first three communities, the board of directors conducted a nationwide search to find the right leader to guide the fledgling utility in its mission to bring electricity to Alaska’s small, rural communities. The board selected Loyd Hodson—the right person...
